entry.title: Re: OVR/INS
entry.content: Insert or Overwrite. It relates to what functionality you want in a field.

entry.title: Re: SAC Script has got no IF (... OR ...) ?

entry.title: Query Manager, Parameters, dropdown list
entry.content:
When asking for the parameters, if the field has these "Contraint values" Like in JDT1 on field TransType. it generates a dropdown list on the parameter.

Is there anywhere i can set these on a table, or when creating a new table, a way to input this valid values?
via SQL for hana db.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan scheduling planned Dates wrong calcu...
entry.content:
Here logic is calculating or adjusted 1 day by scheduling 53 rd call. 

As weekly 7 days and here schedule period is 365 days, you can consider 364 days , may logic will work accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Avalara Configuration in SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I'm trying to find information about how to update BYD for sales/use taxes as reported by Avalara, including the payment drafted from the bank account of my client.  Also there is an AvataxConfiguration work center where data resides and looks like we can reconcile BYD to Avalara, or indeed update Avalara for new exempt customers ---- but there are no help docs on it on Avalara site or SAP.COM.  I've submitted a case to SAP on behalf of client but any real-world advice from one who has done this prior would be helpful.  Thanks so much!   

Carol Casey

M.

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content: Then you can use your union select, and use the select from EINA for the first and select EINE inner join EINA for the second part.

entry.content: That's exactly what I did, are you sure you read my post carefully? My problem is on the MATNR field of the EINE table.

entry.title: Alt Condition base value
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I have requirement where I need to calculate condition value on 2 different parameters, like If a customer is retailer i need to calculate condition value on Gross price and if the customer is Distributor then calculate on Net price.

I hope this can be achieved through a formula routine in Alt Condition base value.

If KUNNR = R then KWERT = KZWI1 grossprice else KWERT = KZWI2.

Need your expert advise.

entry.title: Re: pMRP - Predictive Material and Resource Planning in SAP S/4HANA : Step by Step execution
entry.content:
Thank you for the information; it's very helpful.

I have a question regarding cost simulation. The LTP offers cost simulation capabilities. Does pMRP have similar functionality for cost simulations? Additionally, does SAP have any plans or a roadmap for integrating budgeting or cost simulation features into this functionality? - Many thanks

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content:
I think of something like that:

define view entity ZC_EinaEineUnion as select from eina
{
  key eina.infnr,
  'EINA' as TableSource,
   eina.matnr
}
union all select from eine
inner join eina on eina.infnr = eine.infnr
{
  key eine.infnr,
  'EINE' as TableSource,
  eina.matnr
}

entry.title: Detailed Phased approach for BW/4HANA In-place conversion across landscapes
entry.content:
We have a few general questions about the Phased approach option for the BW/4HANA In-place conversion across the system landscapes. We are confused about the attached image that shows a four phased approach where you would Convert the Development System, Transport and test scenario in Test, and then Transport and Go-live with Scenario in Production. So, our confusion is when we Transport our Phase 1 to Production and our Process chains run that evening in prod, will the converted objects load data from the new ODP data-sources, and the non-converted objects load data from the old SAPI data-sources.

Additionally, can we assume that during Phase 1, when we start the conversion of objects in the (STC01) Conversion Task List and we run into issues, we will fix and collect those objects into a Transport request and continue until the conversion is complete.

Then, we will Transport those requests from Dev to QA, and we will again convert those same objects using (STC01) in QA. 

Thanks, 

Norm

entry.title: Re: Debit and Credits Report for Bank Reconciliation Configuration OT83 Posting Rules
entry.content: I was able to resolve it this way: find every unique transaction using bank account, debit/credit as -/+, then transaction type code. From there, I was able to engineer backgrounds from assign external transactions, to posting rules.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Kolkata
entry.content: Recently I have joined SAP academic community conference India at SAP Lab Bangalore. Happy to meet with professional and explore SAP BTP & SAP business AI. Interest to join here.

entry.title: SWPM SAPHANADB cannot be set during Primary Application Server installation
entry.content:
This is a new installation.
Installing S4Hana 2023 on Hana 2.0 using SWPM 2.0 sp18.
The ASCS was installed, the database installed and now installing the Primary Application Server.

In the define parameters phase it asks for the Database Schema password.
The schema name is already filled in and grayed out with SAPHANADB.
The guide says to just specify a password for SAPHANADB.
The schema does not yet exist in the database, as mentioned this is just the Define Parameters phase so nothing has been executed yet.

This error shows up:
The database connection with database user SAPHANADB cannot be set up. Check that the database is online and the password of user SAPHANADB is correct.

 

The installed database is up and available.

Have tried various iterations of password letters/numbers/length and also mimicked the basic password policy of the Master Password.
The install logs shows errors  INVALID_USER_PASSWORD and also 'authentication failed'.

Wondering if that's the actual error as the user doesn't exist yet, how can the password be invalid and authentication fail if it's just going to create the user?

Log excerpt with server name, port and SID mocked up.
Fri Jul 26 21:26:51 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Start new command section
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.core.jar | Changelist: 212394 | Release: lmts_027_REL | API-Version: 00
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.jar | Changelist: 213789 | Release: lmts_027_REL | API-Version: 35
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Name of HdbCmdClazz: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcDriver | URI: file:/tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/DISTRIBUTED/ABAP/APP1/ngdbc.jar
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Instance is a multiple-container system.
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://<server_name>.mikl.com:<port>/?databaseName=<SID> connect user: SAPHANADB
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible | HDBSLLIB Exception: [INVALID_USER_PASSWORD] com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.SQLInvalidAuthorizationSpecExceptionSapDB: [10]: authentication failed
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | End of HdbCmdClazz section: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

Any feedback appreciated.

entry.content:
I tried several times but if successful, I can't export it to the web version.

Runtime version: 4.11.132;
AB version: 2.12.0
COMMAND:

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template- standalone@4.11.132 -r

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.132 -r


App ID 123687


App ID 123687

entry.title: Re: Trying to access XSA UAA via browser and getting The...
entry.content:
When trying to access the XSA UAA (SAP HANA Extended Services, Advanced User Account and Authentication) via a browser and encountering the error message "The subdomain does not map to a valid identity zone," it typically indicates a configuration issue. Here are steps you can take to troubleshoot and resolve this problem:

  • Check the URL
  • Verify Subdomain and Identity Zone Configuration
  • Check XSA Configuration
  • Check UAA ConfigurationDNS Configuration
  • Logs and Diagnostics
  • Restart Services
  • Contact Support

entry.title: Confirmation that linking carrier to route is not possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear, 

We are investigating if linking the carrier to a certain route is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
According to us there is no way to do this. 

We have the possibility to filter by "service agent" when selecting the route in the Sales document, but there is no way to do the link via the configuration or master data.

Please see screenshot attached. 

Can you please indicate if our investigation is correct and if any alternative solutions are available?

Thanks. 

Kr
Joost


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Confirmation that linking carrier to route is not pos...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I don't see any standard customizing to link the carrier and route at S/4HANA Cloud System.

But if you want determine route according to carrier when creating SO, you may consider BADI like SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM - Modification of Item Custom Fields in Sales Documents.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am using SAP Trial account on my personal PC ( not corporate VPN), but i still get "Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer" while connecting to hana cloud DB.

Kindly suggest how we can resolve this. .

 

Thanks,

Kris

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
@qmacro 

OK - now that your interest was piqued - here is what I did.

I took the communityid and using the spread operator, spread it from a String into an array of individual characters.

Noting that the map() method of an Array creates a new array populated with the results of calling a provided function on every element in the calling array, I used map with a function to convert to lower case and then determine the numeric value of each of the elements. ( the "characters").

The reduce() method of an Array executes a user-supplied "reducer" callback function on each element of the array, passing in the return value from the calculation on the preceding element "forwards". The final result of running the "reducer function" across all elements of the array is a single value. I used reduce to sum the numeric values into one single value. 

So here it is:

const theSum = [...communityid].map(b => b.toLowerCase().charCodeAt()).reduce( (a,b) => a + b )

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Kolkata

Hi,

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

SAP seems to be in demand and my chosen path is Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud.  Starting the learning today! Thankful in advance,

Dana

entry.title: BW Query create cumulative value
entry.content:
Hello All,

Kindly please check below 2 scenario's and help to create the BW Query in BW4HANA.

Scenario 1:

We have the values like below

GL Account Costcenter fiscal year period value1 value2 value3 value4 etc.

  123456      2345          001.2024             100     200     300       400

                                       002.2024

                                        003.2024 etc

 

if we select the fiscalyear period 001.2024 value1 should be show =100

if we select the fiscalyear period 001.2024 to 002. 2024 value should be shown like 300 (Value 100 +200)

if we select the fiscalyear period 001,2024 to 003.2024 value should be shown like  600 (Value 100+200+300) like 12 periods.

Scenario 2:

if we select the period 001.2024 value should be 100

if we select the period 002.2004 value should be 200

if we select the period 003.2024 value should be 300 show like 12 periods

Please check and help me to create the new BW Query.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content:
The solution is: 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZVE_EINA_EINE'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Union EINA and EINE CDS View'
define view entity ZC_EinaEineUnion as select from eina
{
  key eina.infnr,
  'EINA' as TableSource,
  eina.matnr
}
union all
select from eine as e
  inner join eina as i on i.infnr = e.infnr
{
  key e.infnr,
  'EINE' as TableSource,
  i.matnr
}

 

Many thanks to GPT-4o 😉

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: What if we already have event broker technology that is non sap? Can s4 private cloud standard events use non SAP brokers as well or do we first need to use EMIS or advanced event mesh to make s4 events consumable?

entry.title: Re: How to archive EBAN data with specific criteria
entry.content:
Hello,

You want to clean up old purchase order data.

There's a way to automatically delete old purchase orders that don't have a number.

You might need to write some special computer code to do this. Or, you can use the tools that are already in your system.

Let's figure out the best way to do it.

entry.title: Re: SAP EHS SVT: Display Confirmed quantity per order in...
entry.content:
Hello

sorry. nobody can guide you if you have not a  clear requirement (clear cutomer demand... tht data should show up to display etc.)

We are using this BADi; but i am not allowed to share details regarding technical implementation.

You need to discuss with the "end user" and7or expert of SVT process .. what does he/she expect to see in CBRC20 for "Confirmed" data and based on that you might be able to define a "high level design" to be used for this BADi

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Question for SVT Tracking Programs Using 'Initial' op...
entry.content:
Hello

regarding:

The major issue I see is RREGCH_VT program related. Assume some more products are included in future in SVT program(these will not be a new developed products but existing products only). All this newly added products will have logistic data like Purchase orders / Goods receipts / Production orders etc created through out the year. Can we track the logistic data for those products from beginning of the year even though they are included in SVT program in the middle of the year? Because the CCRCT_RUN table time stamp will be current date in that case how can it track the backdated logistic data from beginning?

YOu have may be the wrong understanding how SVT works.

1.) Data can change at any point in time within the year (e.g. "composition is changing" etc.)

2.) New material can be sold, produced purchased this year never seen last year

any many other combinations.

Step 1 is always ro make sure: you have e.g. a "composition" (there is data in CCRCT_EHS_COMP for the effected material)

Step 2: then tracking will run.. (delta mode)

Step 3. If e.g. the user determines.. upps. now it is ime for "RetrackinG" ("reanalyse" all data since 01.01 of a year): SAP has delevered for this a special report to do so.

PS: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/substance-volume-tracking-using-sap-ehs-management/ba-p/13272665 might help

BUt you will find many threads regarding "SVT" (how to use it properly etc.)

Wish you the best

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add custom field in CVD1 Tcode to s...
entry.content:
Hello

sorry to say.. I am not aware of an option to "do this". Only by doing a "modificatioN" it might work.

BUT. You: please check with technical guy. May be by using "Enhancement Points" you can do the trick.

But what do you would like to achieve? What is your requirement?

PS: what you can do without "modification" is to add further "Search options". This is not a modification and you just use "SAP Standard" (you prepare a new user exit to do so).

C.B.

entry.title: Re: MyInbox tasks count error
entry.content: Fixed by applying this note.

entry.title: SAC Script: empty/undefined input parameter of filterValues.type break the storry to an error
entry.content:
Hi,

Problem:
-in a SAC script I want to grasp the value(s) of the Input Parameters of a BW query,
-some input parameters are not set, "undefined", "NULL",
-any command on filterValues.type  like "switch(filterValues.type){]" breaks the storry to an error,
- in this sample where  the first empty variable is ZMO_VAR_REGIO01:

Design:
-query MANAGREP with 10 + Input Parameters
-SAC Story with table MANAGREP
-onResultChanged Event
-the code like bellow, the error raising section boxed in with //+++++++

Possible solution:
-identify empty filterValuetypes and sort them out
-How ?

Any advice is wellcome  :)!

ThanXs.
=====================================================================
Here is the full code, boxed in, //+++++++++++, the errornous section:
=====================================================================

// Get alle the variables form the Query
// MANAGREP is the Table / Query
var filterName = MANAGREP.getDataSource().getVariables();
console.log("++filterName:");
console.log( filterName);
 
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// LOOP over all Input Parameter
for ( var j=0; j < filterName.length; j++){
   console.log("++filterName[j].id:");
   console.log( filterName[j].id);
 
   var filterValues = MANAGREP.getDataSource().getVariableValues(filterName[j].id)[0];
   console.log("++filterValues:");
   console.log(filterValues);
 
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Differentiate type of Input Parameter ( in ABABP: LT_RANGE) to treat values accordingly
    console.log("++filterValues.type:");
 
//+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
// Any operation on filterValues.type breaks with this error, if the parameter is empty, what means not set in the
// query:
// "
// Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'type') 
// TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'type')
// at Proxy.eval (MANAGREP.onResultChanged.js:12:34)
//
// ----> How to handle an undefined input parameter ? <----------
//++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 
    console.log(filterValues.type);
switch(filterValues.type){
 
case VariableValueType.Single:
         console.log("++VariableValueType.Single:");
         console.log(VariableValueType.Single);
 
// Get  a single value from the input parameter
     var singlefilterValue = cast(Type.SingleVariableValue, filterValues );
         console.log(" singlefilterValuefilterValues:");
         console.log( singlefilterValue.value);
//       Add some logic on the single values of the single inut parameter here:
         break;
 
   case VariableValueType.Multiple:
        console.log("++VariableValueType.Multiple:");
        console.log(VariableValueType.Multiple);
 
    var multiFilterValues = cast(Type.MultipleVariableValue,  filterValues);
        console.log("multiFilterValues filterValues:");
        console.log( multiFilterValues.values);
//---------------------------------------------------
// Loop over the values of the multiple value input parameter
    for ( var i = 0; i < multiFilterValues.values.length; i++){
      console.log("multiFilterValues.values[i]  filterValues:");
    console.log( multiFilterValues.values[i]);
//          Add some logic on the multiple values of the parameterhere:
    }
//---------------------------------------------------
// Loop END over the values of the parameter
     break;
case VariableValueType.Range:
     console.log("++VariableValueType.Range:");
         console.log(VariableValueType.Range);
//       Get the value of the ranges, how  ?
//       Add some logic on the range values of the range input parameter here:
         break;
 
   default:
console.log("++DEFAULT");
        break; 
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Differentiate type of Input Parameter ( in ABABP: LT_RANGE)
}
//---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// LOOP over Input Parameter
}
console.log("FINISHED");

entry.title: Что такое реферальный код OKX и как он работает?
entry.content:
Реферальный код OKX:BET888
Скидка на торговые сборы:снижает торговые сборы на 50%.
До бонусов:бонусы до $10000 USDT доступны для новых пользователей.
Вознаграждение за регистрацию:потенциальное вознаграждение до $1000 USDT.
Неограниченные рефералы:нет ограничений на рефералов для существующих пользователей.

Что такое реферальный код OKX и как он работает? Реферальный код OKX, такой как BET888, — это рекламный инструмент, который позволяет пользователям приглашать других присоединиться к OKX и получать выгоду от эксклюзивных предложений. Когда новый пользователь регистрируется с использованием этого реферального кода, он получает скидку 50% на торговые сборы и может заработать до $10000 USDT в виде бонусов. Человек, который поделился кодом, также может получать вознаграждения в зависимости от структуры реферальной программы.

 

 

 

 

 

Есть ли какие-либо преимущества использования реферального кода OKX при регистрации? Да, использование реферального кода OKX BET888 при регистрации дает значительные преимущества, включая скидку 50% на торговые сборы, что может существенно снизить транзакционные издержки, и право на получение до 10 000 долларов США в виде бонусов, что улучшает ваш торговый опыт.

 

 

 

 

 

 

Какие текущие реферальные акции OKX доступны в 2024 году? В 2024 году OKX предлагает такие акции, как реферальный код BET888, который обеспечивает скидку на комиссию за торговлю в размере 50% и бонусы до 10 000 долларов США. Эти акции могут различаться, поэтому рекомендуется проверять веб-сайт или приложение OKX на предмет последних предложений.

entry.title: DB refresh activity in SAP TST
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Current Landscape S4hana 1909 - Windows, HANA2.0 - Linux (distributed environment) both PRD and TST.

SAP S4HANA1909 DEV, TST and PRD configured with Solution manager for CHARM TR process.

We are planning to perform DB refresh from PRD to TST. Is there any specific pre-steps/tasks to be perform related Charm?. We have to make sure Charm process should be impacted after DB refresh activity.

Can you please check and advise.

entry.title: OKX Empfehlungscode: BET888 – Wie funktioniert das?
entry.content:
OKX-EmpfehlungscodeBET888
Rabatt auf HandelsgebührenReduziert die Handelsgebühren um 50 %.
Bis zu BoniBoni bis zu 10.000 USDT für neue Benutzer verfügbar.
AnmeldeprämieMögliche Prämie bis zu 1.000 USDT.
Unbegrenzte EmpfehlungenKeine Begrenzung der Empfehlungen für bestehende Benutzer.

Was ist ein OKX-Empfehlungscode und wie funktioniert er? Ein OKX-Empfehlungscode wie BET888 ist ein Werbetool, mit dem Benutzer andere einladen können, OKX beizutreten und von exklusiven Angeboten zu profitieren. Wenn sich ein neuer Benutzer mit diesem Empfehlungscode anmeldet, erhält er 50 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren und kann bis zu 10.000 USDT an Boni verdienen. Die Person, die den Code geteilt hat, kann je nach Struktur des Empfehlungsprogramms auch Prämien verdienen.Wie finde ich einen OKX-Empfehlungscode? Sie können den OKX-Empfehlungscode BET888 über Online-Suchen, Foren, soziale Medien und Websites finden, auf denen bestehende Benutzer oder Partner Aktionscodes teilen. Einige offizielle OKX-Aktionen können diese Codes auch per E-Mail oder Benachrichtigungen verteilen.Gibt es Vorteile, wenn ich bei der Anmeldung einen OKX-Empfehlungscode verwende? Ja, die Verwendung des OKX-Empfehlungscodes BET888 bei der Anmeldung bietet erhebliche Vorteile, darunter einen Rabatt von 50 % auf Handelsgebühren, der die Transaktionskosten erheblich senken kann, und die Berechtigung, bis zu 10.000 USDT an Boni zu verdienen, was Ihr Handelserlebnis verbessert.Können bestehende OKX-Benutzer ihre Empfehlungscodes generieren? Ja, bestehende OKX-Benutzer können ihre Empfehlungscodes über ihr OKX-Konto-Dashboard generieren. Dadurch können sie personalisierte Empfehlungslinks mit anderen teilen und möglicherweise Belohnungen im Rahmen des OKX-Empfehlungsprogramms verdienen.Welche aktuellen OKX-Empfehlungsaktionen sind im Jahr 2024 verfügbar? Im Jahr 2024 bietet OKX Aktionen wie den Empfehlungscode BET888 an, der einen Rabatt von 50 % auf die Handelsgebühr und Boni von bis zu 10.000 USDT bietet. Diese Aktionen können variieren, daher wird empfohlen, die Website oder App von OKX auf die neuesten Angebote zu überprüfen.

entry.title: Re: SWPM SAPHANADB cannot be set during Primary Applicati...
entry.content: Found an issue with the preceding schema database load, SAPHANADB should have existed in the database.  Since it didn't, authentication failed. Upon successful load of S4Core Exports in to the Tenant database the issue was resolved.

entry.title: Code de parrainage OKX : BET888 - Comment ça marche ?
entry.content:
Code de parrainage OKXBET888
Remise sur les frais de tradingréduit les frais de trading de 50 %.
Jusqu'aux bonusbonus jusqu'à 10 000 USDT disponibles pour les nouveaux utilisateurs.
Récompense d'inscriptionrécompense potentielle jusqu'à 1 000 USDT.
Parrainages illimitésaucune limite de parrainage pour les utilisateurs existants.

Qu'est-ce qu'un code de parrainage OKX et comment fonctionne-t-il ? Un code de parrainage OKX, tel que BET888, est un outil promotionnel qui permet aux utilisateurs d'inviter d'autres personnes à rejoindre OKX et de bénéficier d'offres exclusives. Lorsqu'un nouvel utilisateur s'inscrit à l'aide de ce code de parrainage, il bénéficie d'une remise de 50 % sur les frais de trading et peut gagner jusqu'à 10 000 USDT en bonus. La personne qui a partagé le code peut également gagner des récompenses en fonction de la structure du programme de parrainage.

L'utilisation d'un code de parrainage OKX lors de l'inscription présente-t-elle des avantages ? Oui, l'utilisation du code de parrainage OKX BET888 lors de l'inscription offre des avantages significatifs, notamment une remise de 50 % sur les frais de négociation, ce qui peut réduire considérablement les coûts de transaction, et l'éligibilité pour gagner jusqu'à 10 000 USDT en bonus, améliorant ainsi votre expérience de trading.

Quelles sont les promotions de parrainage OKX actuellement disponibles en 2024 ? En 2024, OKX propose des promotions telles que le code de parrainage BET888, qui offre une réduction de 50 % sur les frais de négociation et des bonus allant jusqu'à 10 000 USDT. Ces promotions peuvent varier, il est donc recommandé de consulter le site Web ou l'application OKX pour connaître les dernières offres.Comment appliquer un code de parrainage OKX lors de l'inscription ? Pour appliquer le code de parrainage OKX BET888, saisissez-le dans le champ prévu à cet effet lors du processus d'inscription. Ce champ se trouve généralement sur la page d'inscription, où vous saisissez vos informations personnelles et celles de votre compte, afin de vous assurer de recevoir les avantages associés.

entry.title: How to enable parallel processing - Cube to DSO load
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have some flow in SAP BW 7.5 on HANA system : Cube to DSO load. ( We need to persist data into DSO for some business requirement so that that flat table can be used for Look ups, HANA CV's in further levels)

All of the field mappings are one to one in BW TRFN, So I have used the "HANA Execution" option.

But, currently that dtp load is happening at one go as a data Insertion as its "hana execution"  & I don't have any control to enable the parallel extraction as its Greyed out in DTP screen.

So, how can we enable Parallel extraction/ Insertion incase of HANA Execution/AMDP ?  because currently its inserting all data at once using that - SAP HANA Execution option & occupying 400GB of memory. We want that Inserts happening in parallel.

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: S/4 Hana Cloud Public - Configuring "Value Date Rules...

entry.title: Re: SAP WEB IDE Orion Crashing
entry.content: It's working By changing Port number

entry.title: Re: SAP WEB IDE Orion Crashing
entry.content: Its Working after changing "Port number"

entry.title: What is the difference between Release Upgrade and Version in SAP ?
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

Recently we had a request for performing EHP Upgrade 

Source -> EHP4 and NW 7.0

Target -> EHP8 and NW 7.5

During the upgrade we got ASUTOOL Box Phase where it is primarily asked when Release Upgrade is being in process right ?

Wanted to know whether Above Upgrade comes under "Release Upgrade" or "Version Upgrade".

Thanks,
Mithran

entry.title: Re: Mainstream Maintenance Extended for SAP Identity Management 8.0 and SAP Single Sign-On 3.0
entry.content: SAP Single Sign On 3.0 product out of support from 2027, what products will be replaced by SAP for all netweaver customers

entry.title: Need BAPI for Transaction code LT06 after PGI ?
entry.content:
Hi Friends ,

 SAP ABAP doubt 
 Flow Sales Order -> Delivery -> PGI -> Transfer Order creation -> Transfer Order confirmation

 I have created sales order (VA01)
 Created Delivery for that Sales order (VL01N)
 PGI generated for that Delivery (VL01N / VL02N)

 Please suggest BAPI to create Transfer Order After PGI (LT06) 
 OR
 Steps / How to use BAPI - L_TO_CREATE_TR ?

Note : Need process After PGI

entry.title: PDS not captured in CFM1
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created the Integration model for PDS but I don't see any PDS captured in CFM1 transactions. When I tick the check box of PPM then I can see the data for PPM.

Why this difference? Is there any extra settings for PDS compared to PPM ?

Please suggest.

Thanks,

Prabhat

entry.title: Create Purchase Order with reference Purchase order using BAPI
entry.content:
Hi Abapers,

i am going create PO with reference po using BAPI. i know that BAPI_PO_CREATE1 can be used to create PO.

can i get some idea how to create PO with reference PO using BAPI.

Thanks in advance

@Sandraroosi

entry.title: Re: BW Query create cumulative value
entry.content:
Hallo GVR,

You can try with the restrict selection option, key figure Value with  GL Account Costcenter fiscal year period(create customer exist variable) and in calculation tab enable it cumulated  = ON

let me know if it works out.

entry.title: Re: How to correct invalid time dependent MD in SAP BW
Re: How to correct invalid time dependent MD in SAP BW

entry.title: Posted the stock using MIGO, move type 561, showing in MD04 , MMBE but not in CO09
entry.content:
Hi All

I posted the stock using MIGO with move type 561. The entry is showing in MB51, 

MMBE showing the stock

MD04: showing the stock

 

but in CO09, showing blank

in sales order for 30 qty,  while clicking on ATP, it is showing nothing ( 0 qty)

in MMBE, MD04 but NOT  in Co09. and unable to confirm the schedule lines. what could be the reason why system is not showing in ATP(CO09). 

Other information: in Material master the safety stock is NOT maintained anything. and we are using S4 hana 2023 system

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2023 FPS00 Upgrade
entry.content: The NetWeaver platform is not available in S/4HANA, do they need to provision licenses for NetWeaver applications?

entry.title: NetWeaver platform is not available in S/4HANA
entry.content:
The  NetWeaver platform is not available in S/4HANA, do they need to provision licenses for NetWeaver application

SAP NET WEAVER SINGLE SIGN ON SSO replacement ? since SSO 3.0 end of support by 2027.

entry.title: Filtering Workflows based on Payrun A or Payrun B
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We are using SF EC and have two groups of employees for whom we run fortnightly payruns ie payrun A (01 July to 14 July) & B (08 July to 21 July). Can we filter workflows for payrun A employees (need to focus on coming due payrun) and also filter workflow for payrun B employees. 

Will highly appreciate help. 
Regards,

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Here's my submission:

 That Key-as-Segment URL Syntax is interesting, and it can be combined with the parentheses-style in the same URL.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse Picking by 2 workers
entry.content:
Hi,

You have three options to achieve this:

  1. 2-Step Picking
  2. Pick-Pack-Pass Process in EWM
  3. Apply LOSC (if it’s the usual or standard process in warehouse)

For more detailed information, you can refer to SAP Blogs covering each topic.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
There's languages and there's languages. Compilers can enforce strict grammars. Street lingo, on the other hand, evolves organically rather than by version releases. 

https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/kudo

I primarily bemoan that forte has 2 syllables now.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: My Task4 Submission

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PLANNEDORDER_CREATE: Shift basic finish date to next workday not possible
entry.content: Not possible. See/debug FORM CHECK_PLAF_TERMINE (LM61OF8Q). You would need to check and adjust the date in your own coding before calling the BAPI.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in S/4HANA Cloud (Cloud ERP)
entry.content: 老师，请问外币评估的凭证为啥多出来两行金额为0的，利润中心和细分都是一样的

entry.title: Re: What is difference between Installation Export and Upgrade Export in SWDC
entry.content: Dear Guru's,

entry.title: Re: What is difference between Installation Export and Up...
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

Installation Export will be used only for NEW System Installation which we term as "Vanilla Installation".

We need to use "Installation Export" for the same.

In case of "Upgrade Export"  --> this will be used during Upgrades like EHP 4 to  EHP8.

adding further EHP8 is different from all other EHP upgrades like for example -->

EHP4 to EHP5/EHP6 and EHP7 --> IN this case Shadow system will build a clone.

Where as in EHP8 Shadow system will build from DVD and not a clone kind of setup.

Thanks and Regards,
Mithran

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Amazing even this kind of circular references work with ease 

/odata/v4/northbreeze/Suppliers(1)?$expand=Products($expand=Category,Supplier($expand=Products($expand=Supplier)))

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David,
l identity myself as a woman.
I have completed the course Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, manufacturing. I want to develop my digital skills, get more experience in the field, and work as a certified consultant. This experience would be very beneficial to me as I continue on my educational path towards achieving career growth. Looking forward to receiving a redemption code for the SAP certification attempt.

Regards,
Tanzil Shaikh

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content: Big thanks to @qmacro and everyone who’s been part of this interesting conversation. I’m not a pro developer, so I’m sorry I didn’t have much to add. But I’m learning a lot and hope to contribute more in the future!

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Catching up this fantastic task during the weekend, here's my submission - 

My CQL statement to determing the number of products (count) was working fine when tested locally (localhost:4004), but was failing after deploying to CF. It took me quite some time to figure out that the issue was the "count" function needs an alias to work in CF i.e.; 'count(ProductID) as count'.  Strange???

Finally, got it working with 

New learning!! 🙂

entry.title: Hello World!
entry.content: Hello SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: SAC Script has got no IF (... OR ...) ?
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

not sure if I understand your question when you say "others"? So, if you want to use if then else with "OR" condition:

if (condition1 || condition2 || condition3) then {

//this code will be executed if any of the previous conditions are true

}

else {

//this code will be applied for the "others" conditions

} 

 

Am I answering your question?

 

Regards,

Javier
